data.content: Plan review result: approved. The plan is complete and feasible, covers the requested tag display and combined tag/setlist filtering, and identifies the main maintainability constraint: keep new helper logic out of src/lib/beat-state-overview.ts because it is near the 500-line source limit. Test strategy is adequate: focused helper tests for tag normalization/filtering/setlist label truncation plus component coverage for rendered tags or equivalent focused behavior coverage. No invariants were listed on the knot, and the plan respects repo rules by requiring a dedicated worktree, bun install, quality gates, and no PR workflow.
